title: Update firewall rules for new office subnet
description: Add rules for the 10.4.64.0/24 subnet to the perimeter firewall.

title: Patch Apache HTTP Server on web-01
description: Install latest Apache HTTP Server security patch to address CVE-2025-12345.

title: Remediate dependency audit findings in frontend project
description:
Dependency audit report for the frontend project identified the following issues:

- lodash@4.17.20 has a critical prototype pollution vulnerability (CVE-2021-23337) allowing remote code execution. Upgrade to lodash@4.17.21 immediately.
- The 'request' package is deprecated and no longer maintained. No known active exploits, but it pulls in 20+ transitive dependencies with security debt. Remove and replace with node-fetch or axios.

These findings require immediate remediation according to our dependency policy.

title: Review user access for terminated contractor
description: Contractor Jane Smith (jane.smith@external) ended engagement on March 1. Revoke all system accesses and rotate credentials.

title: Configure DNS failover for customer portal
description: Set up DNS failover between primary and secondary regions for portal.example.com to meet 99.95% uptime SLA.
